title: RulesetBinding
description: Routing: (class, environment) -> packs + risk threshold (ADR-0010 bindings.yaml). bindings[] is a named collection with mandatory unique (class, environment) IDs — source order carries no meaning without an explicit priority (ADR-0017 §9).

environment.description: References a Config environments[].name, or "*" as the documented wildcard/default.

threshold.description: sum(points) at or below this value approves (ADR-0007); over it reviews.

require.description: The named obligations this (class, environment) requires — the authored home for ADR-0017 §2 obligation coverage. Each entry must be proved by a rule in the bound packs (a MergePolicy rule's prove.obligation); a require entry that no rule proves is a lint hard error (docs/planning/lint-hard-errors.md, obligation coverage). Absent or empty ⇒ no required obligations (vacuously covered). Mirrors the runtime EvaluationInput.require the engine emits per class slice.
